errors.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

layers.title: Layer Management
layers.subtitle: Manage groups and layers for the map

layerTab.clickSyncToFetch: Click "Sync from GeoServer" to fetch layers

groupTab.createGroupsToOrganize: Create groups to organize your layers

layerModal.noLegendItems: No legend items. Click "Add Class" to add a custom legend (overrides group legend).

groupModal.selectParentHint: Select a parent to create nested groups
groupModal.noLegendItems: No legend items. Click "Add Class" to start.
groupModal.legendHint: Legend will be displayed on the map for all layers in this group. Child groups without a legend will inherit this.

errors.invalidJsonFormat: Invalid JSON format for class labels
errors.confirmDeleteLayer: Are you sure you want to delete this layer?
errors.confirmDeleteGroupWithChildren: This group has child groups that will also be deleted. Layers will become ungrouped. Are you sure?
errors.confirmDeleteGroup: Layers in this group will become ungrouped. Are you sure?

clips.title: Clip Management
clips.subtitle: Pre-clip rasters to country boundaries for instant loading
clips.noClippableLayersHint: Layers need a file_path to be clip-able
clips.syncStyleFirst: Sync layer to assign a style first

infoBox.clickProgressBar: Click the progress bar to see which countries are done and which remain
infoBox.clipAllInfo: Clicking "Clip All" clips the raster for all {{count}} countries using the clip-service
infoBox.clipRemainingInfo: Clicking "Clip Remaining" only processes countries not yet in cache
infoBox.largeCountriesWarning: Large countries (Algeria, DR Congo, Sudan, etc.) may take 10-15 minutes each
infoBox.autoRefreshInfo: The page auto-refreshes every 5 seconds while a batch is running
infoBox.resumeInfo: If interrupted, click Clip again to resume from where it left off
infoBox.deleteAllInfo: Use "Delete All" to unpublish clipped layers from GeoServer and clear the cache
infoBox.individualDeleteInfo: In the country detail modal, you can delete individual country clips

confirmDialog.deleteClippedLayerMessage: Remove the clipped layer for "{{country}}" from {{layer}}? This will unpublish it from GeoServer.
confirmDialog.deleteAllClippedLayersMessage: Remove ALL {{count}} clipped layers ({{size}}) for "{{layer}}" from GeoServer? This cannot be undone.

errors.noStyleAssigned: This layer has no style assigned. Sync layers first.
errors.batchInProgress: Batch already in progress for this layer.

stats.title: Stats Management
stats.subtitle: Pre-calculate land cover statistics for all African countries. Stats are computed once and served instantly to users.
stats.noCalculableLayersHint: Layers need a file_path and class_labels to be calculable
stats.syncLabelsFirst: Sync layer to assign class labels first

infoBox.clickProgressBar: Click the progress bar to see which countries are done and which remain
infoBox.calculateAllInfo: Clicking "Calculate All" computes land cover statistics for all {{count}} countries using the clip-service
infoBox.calculateRemainingInfo: Clicking "Calculate Remaining" only processes countries not yet in cache
infoBox.largeCountriesWarning: Large countries (Algeria, DR Congo, Sudan, etc.) may take 10-15 minutes each
infoBox.autoRefreshInfo: The page auto-refreshes every 5 seconds while a batch is running
infoBox.resumeInfo: If interrupted, click Calculate again to resume from where it left off
infoBox.statsServedInstantly: Stats are served instantly to users once pre-calculated

errors.noClassLabels: This layer has no class labels. Sync layers first.
errors.batchInProgress: Batch already in progress for this layer.

confirmDialog.deleteAllStatsMessage: Remove ALL {{count}} pre-calculated stats for "{{layer}}"? This cannot be undone.
